pr.title: Record: 11L + EMA + Tight SWA + QAT0.15 + VE128 + Partial RoPE + LN Scale (val_bpb: 1.1243)

output.summary: EMA stacked with Tight SWA, earlier late-stage int6 QAT, and longer warmdown on the 11-layer FlashAttention U-Net-like model with VE, partial RoPE, and LN scaling.
techniques: EMA and Tight SWA weight averaging
Extended warmdown plus earlier late-stage int6 QAT
VE128, partial RoPE, and LN scaling on FlashAttention U-Net
